attributes.content:
## Overview

The Slide Deck card gives the workspace a structured home for presentation as ordered slides. Each slide is a fitted card. Speaker notes per slide.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Slide Deck usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Report]]** -- Slide Deck can feed rollups and summaries that surface trends, status, or outcomes.
- **[[Metrics (KPI)]]** -- Metrics (KPI) can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Slide Deck.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Slide Deck can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Slide Deck into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Task]]** -- Slide Deck often creates follow-up work or is itself tracked through task execution.
- **[[Project]]** -- Slide Deck can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Slide Deck as the structured home for presentation as ordered slides. Each slide is a fitted card. Speaker notes per slide and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Slide Deck when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Slide Deck stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.
